task_completion.description: Verify that a Unit Process named 'Bio-based Polyol Production' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Bio-based Polyol Production' in the OpenLCA navigation tree under Processes, or as the active tab title for a Process.

task_completion.description: Verify that an Actor named 'EcoTech Consulting' is created and linked as the Data Generator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'EcoTech Consulting' entered in the 'Data generator' field within the Administrative information or General tab of the Process.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Source named 'Q4 2024 Production Report' is created and linked as the Publication/Source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Q4 2024 Production Report' entered in the 'Publication', 'Source', or 'Literature reference' field of the Process.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Geography/Location is set for the process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a valid location code (e.g., 'US', 'GLO') selected in the 'Geography' or 'Location' drop-down field of the Process.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Technology Description is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Enzymatic hydrolysis of agricultural residues.' (including the trailing period) in the 'Technology description' or 'Description' text box of the Process.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Validity period start date is set to 2024-01-01.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '2024-01-01' entered in the 'Start date', 'Time', or 'Validity' field within the Process metadata.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenLCA graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual OpenLCA application window with its standard menus, tabs, and navigation tree, not a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected answers into a text document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be entered into the specific OpenLCA form fields (e.g., Data generator, Location, Technology description), not a generic notepad or script file.

integrity.description: Verify that the Actor and Source were genuinely created in the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Actor and Source names should appear as selectable database entities (often with specific icons next to them in the form fields or visible in the navigation tree), rather than just plain text typed into a non-linked description field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Process Name: 'Bio-based Polyol Production'. Actor Name: 'EcoTech Consulting'. Source Name: 'Q4 2024 Production Report'. Technology Description: 'Enzymatic hydrolysis of agricultural residues.' (must include the trailing period). Validity Start Date: '2024-01-01' (Year must be 2024).
